metadata.name: LP_ACTIONS_LEVANA
metadata.comment: Records of liquidity provider that occurred on the Levana platform

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

LIQUIDITY_PROVIDER_ADDRESS.name: LIQUIDITY_PROVIDER_ADDRESS
LIQUIDITY_PROVIDER_ADDRESS.comment: The address that took an action on the pool.

LP_ACTION.name: LP_ACTION
LP_ACTION.comment: The action that the liquidity provider took. The value is one of the following: add_liquidity,remove_liquidity

TOKEN1_AMOUNT.name: TOKEN1_AMOUNT
TOKEN1_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of the first token provided by the liquidity provider

TOKEN1_CURRENCY.name: TOKEN1_CURRENCY
TOKEN1_CURRENCY.comment: The currency of the first token provided by the liquidity provider

TOKEN2_AMOUNT.name: TOKEN2_AMOUNT
TOKEN2_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of the second token provided by the liquidity provider

TOKEN2_CURRENCY.name: TOKEN2_CURRENCY
TOKEN2_CURRENCY.comment: The currency of the second token provided by the liquidity provider

LP_TOKEN_AMOUNT.name: LP_TOKEN_AMOUNT
LP_TOKEN_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of LP tokens that were added, removed, bonded, or unbonded from the pool.

LP_TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: LP_TOKEN_ADDRESS
LP_TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The address of LP tokens that were added, removed, bonded, or unbonded from the pool.

metadata.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS
metadata.comment: This table contains transaction level data for the SEI EVM Blockchain. Each transaction will have a unique transaction hash, along with transactions fees and a ETH value transferred when applicable. Transactions may be native ETH transfers or interactions with contract addresses. For more information, please see [The Ethereum Organization - Transactions](https://ethereum.org/en/developers/docs/transactions/)

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The sending address of this transaction.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The receiving address of this transaction. This can be a contract address.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of the contract call.

VALUE_PRECISE_RAW.name: VALUE_PRECISE_RAW
VALUE_PRECISE_RAW.comment: The precise, unadjusted amount of the transaction. This is returned as a string to avoid precision loss.

VALUE_PRECISE.name: VALUE_PRECISE
VALUE_PRECISE.comment: The precise, adjusted amount of the transaction. This is returned as a string to avoid precision loss.

TX_FEE.name: TX_FEE
TX_FEE.comment: Amount paid to validate the transaction in ETH.

TX_FEE_PRECISE.name: TX_FEE_PRECISE
TX_FEE_PRECISE.comment: The precise amount of the transaction fee. This is returned as a string to avoid precision loss.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Whether the transaction was successful, returned as a boolean.

NONCE.name: NONCE
NONCE.comment: The number of transactions sent from a given address.

TX_POSITION.name: TX_POSITION
TX_POSITION.comment: The position of the transaction within the block.

INPUT_DATA.name: INPUT_DATA
INPUT_DATA.comment: This column contains additional data for this transaction, and is commonly used as part of a contract interaction or as a message to the recipient.

GAS_PRICE.name: GAS_PRICE
GAS_PRICE.comment: Cost per unit of gas in Gwei.

EFFECTIVE_GAS_PRICE.name: EFFECTIVE_GAS_PRICE
EFFECTIVE_GAS_PRICE.comment: The total base charge plus tip paid for each unit of gas, in Gwei.

GAS_LIMIT.name: GAS_LIMIT
GAS_LIMIT.comment: Maximum amount of gas allocated for the transaction.

CUMULATIVE_GAS_USED.name: CUMULATIVE_GAS_USED
CUMULATIVE_GAS_USED.comment: The total amount of gas used when this transaction was executed in the block.

MAX_FEE_PER_GAS.name: MAX_FEE_PER_GAS
MAX_FEE_PER_GAS.comment: The maximum fee per gas of the transaction, in Gwei.

MAX_PRIORITY_FEE_PER_GAS.name: MAX_PRIORITY_FEE_PER_GAS
MAX_PRIORITY_FEE_PER_GAS.comment: The maximum priority fee per gas of the transaction, in Gwei.

R.name: R
R.comment: The r value of the transaction signature.

S.name: S
S.comment: The s value of the transaction signature.

V.name: V
V.comment: The v value of the transaction signature.

FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID
FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

STATUS.name: STATUS
STATUS.comment: This column is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please update your queries by March 10, 2025. Please use `TX_SUCCEEDED` instead.

POSITION.name: POSITION
POSITION.comment: This column is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please update your queries by March 10, 2025. Please use `TX_POSITION` instead.

BLOCK_HASH.name: BLOCK_HASH
BLOCK_HASH.comment: This column is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please update your queries by March 10, 2025.

metadata.name: EZ_PERP_TRADES
metadata.comment: Vertex perpetuals are derivative contracts on an underlying spot asset. On Vertex, all perpetual contracts trade against USDC.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This field will not be unique in this table, as a given transaction can include multiple events.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The decoded event name for a given event.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address of this transaction.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address of this transaction.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The specific Vertex product symbol, if it is a futures product it will have a -PERP suffix.

DIGEST.name: DIGEST
DIGEST.comment: The identifier for a specific trade, this can be split across two or more base deltas in order to fill the entire amount of the trade.

TRADER.name: TRADER
TRADER.comment: The wallet address of the trader, there can be multiple subaccounts associated with a trader.

SUBACCOUNT.name: SUBACCOUNT
SUBACCOUNT.comment: Independent Vertex account of trader with its own margin, balance, positions, and trades. Any wallet can open an arbitrary number of these. Risk is not carried over from subaccount to subaccount.

TRADE_TYPE.name: TRADE_TYPE
TRADE_TYPE.comment: They type of trade taken, long/short for perps or buy/sell for spot.

ORDER_TYPE.name: ORDER_TYPE
ORDER_TYPE.comment:
Decode from raw expiration number to binary then converted back to int from the most significant two bits: 
Value: 0
Description: Default order, where it will attempt to take from the book and then become a resting limit order if there is quantity remaining

Value: 1
Description: Immediate-or-cancel order, which is the same as a default order except it doesn’t become a resting limit order

Value: 2
Description: Fill-or-kill order, which is the same as an IOC order except either the entire order has to be filled or none of it

Value: 3
Description: Post-only order, where the order is not allowed to take from the book. An error is returned if the order would cross the bid ask spread

MARKET_REDUCE_FLAG.name: MARKET_REDUCE_FLAG
MARKET_REDUCE_FLAG.comment: A reduce-only is an order that will either close or reduce your position. The reduce-only flag can only be set on IOC or FOK order types. Send a reduce-only order by setting the 3rd most significant bit on the expiration field.

EXPIRATION.name: EXPIRATION
EXPIRATION.comment: Time after which the order should automatically be cancelled, as a timestamp in seconds after the unix epoch, converted to datetime.

NONCE.name: NONCE
NONCE.comment: Number used to differentiate between the same order multiple times, and a user trying to place an order with the same parameters twice. Represented as a string.

IS_TAKER.name: IS_TAKER
IS_TAKER.comment: Boolean representing if the trader was the taker or maker.

PRICE_AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: PRICE_AMOUNT_UNADJ
PRICE_AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: The price amount that the trade was executed at.

PRICE_AMOUNT.name: PRICE_AMOUNT
PRICE_AMOUNT.comment: The price amount that the trade was executed at, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: AMOUNT_UNADJ
AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: The total size of the trade in units of the asset being traded.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The total size of the trade in units of the asset being traded across one digest, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The size of the trade in USD. Base Delta multiplied by the price amount.

FEE_AMOUNT.name: FEE_AMOUNT
FEE_AMOUNT.comment: The fees on the trade, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ
BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: Represents the net change in the total quantity of orders at a particular price level, the sum of these across the same digest is equal to the amount. This is the first currency listed in the pair and acts as the reference point for the exchange rate, in this case the crypto asset trading against USDC.

BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT.name: BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT
BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT.comment: Represents the net change in the total quantity of orders at a particular price level, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract. The sum of these across the same digest is equal to the amount. This is the first currency listed in the pair and acts as the reference point for the exchange rate, in this case the crypto asset trading against USDC.

QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ
QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: A positive value is an increase in spread and a negative value is a decrease in spread. Quote is currency used to express the value of the base currency. It's often the more well-known or stable currency in the pair. In this case, USDC.

QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT.name: QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT
QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT.comment: The net change in the best bid and best ask prices in the order book, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract. A positive value is an increase in spread and a negative value is a decrease in spread. Quote is currency used to express the value of the base currency. It's often the more well-known or stable currency in the pair. In this case, USDC.

EZ_PERP_TRADES_ID.name: EZ_PERP_TRADES_ID
EZ_PERP_TRADES_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_SPOT_TRADES
metadata.comment: Vertex’s spot markets allow you to buy or sell listed crypto assets paired with USD-denominated stablecoins.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This field will not be unique in this table, as a given transaction can include multiple events.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The decoded event name for a given event.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address of this transaction.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address of this transaction.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The specific Vertex product symbol, if it is a futures product it will have a -PERP suffix.

DIGEST.name: DIGEST
DIGEST.comment: The identifier for a specific trade, this can be split across two or more base deltas in order to fill the entire amount of the trade.

TRADER.name: TRADER
TRADER.comment: The wallet address of the trader, there can be multiple subaccounts associated with a trader.

SUBACCOUNT.name: SUBACCOUNT
SUBACCOUNT.comment: Independent Vertex account of trader with its own margin, balance, positions, and trades. Any wallet can open an arbitrary number of these. Risk is not carried over from subaccount to subaccount.

TRADE_TYPE.name: TRADE_TYPE
TRADE_TYPE.comment: They type of trade taken, long/short for perps or buy/sell for spot.

ORDER_TYPE.name: ORDER_TYPE
ORDER_TYPE.comment:
Decode from raw expiration number to binary then converted back to int from the most significant two bits: 
Value: 0
Description: Default order, where it will attempt to take from the book and then become a resting limit order if there is quantity remaining

Value: 1
Description: Immediate-or-cancel order, which is the same as a default order except it doesn’t become a resting limit order

Value: 2
Description: Fill-or-kill order, which is the same as an IOC order except either the entire order has to be filled or none of it

Value: 3
Description: Post-only order, where the order is not allowed to take from the book. An error is returned if the order would cross the bid ask spread

MARKET_REDUCE_FLAG.name: MARKET_REDUCE_FLAG
MARKET_REDUCE_FLAG.comment: A reduce-only is an order that will either close or reduce your position. The reduce-only flag can only be set on IOC or FOK order types. Send a reduce-only order by setting the 3rd most significant bit on the expiration field.

EXPIRATION.name: EXPIRATION
EXPIRATION.comment: Time after which the order should automatically be cancelled, as a timestamp in seconds after the unix epoch, converted to datetime.

NONCE.name: NONCE
NONCE.comment: Number used to differentiate between the same order multiple times, and a user trying to place an order with the same parameters twice. Represented as a string.

IS_TAKER.name: IS_TAKER
IS_TAKER.comment: Boolean representing if the trader was the taker or maker.

PRICE_AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: PRICE_AMOUNT_UNADJ
PRICE_AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: The price amount that the trade was executed at.

PRICE_AMOUNT.name: PRICE_AMOUNT
PRICE_AMOUNT.comment: The price amount that the trade was executed at, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: AMOUNT_UNADJ
AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: The total size of the trade in units of the asset being traded.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The total size of the trade in units of the asset being traded across one digest, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

AMOUNT_USD.name: AMOUNT_USD
AMOUNT_USD.comment: The size of the trade in USD. Base Delta multiplied by the price amount.

FEE_AMOUNT.name: FEE_AMOUNT
FEE_AMOUNT.comment: The fees on the trade, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ
BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: Represents the net change in the total quantity of orders at a particular price level, the sum of these across the same digest is equal to the amount. This is the first currency listed in the pair and acts as the reference point for the exchange rate, in this case the crypto asset trading against USDC.

BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT.name: BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT
BASE_DELTA_AMOUNT.comment: Represents the net change in the total quantity of orders at a particular price level, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract. The sum of these across the same digest is equal to the amount. This is the first currency listed in the pair and acts as the reference point for the exchange rate, in this case the crypto asset trading against USDC.

QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ
QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: A positive value is an increase in spread and a negative value is a decrease in spread. Quote is currency used to express the value of the base currency. It's often the more well-known or stable currency in the pair. In this case, USDC.

QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT.name: QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT
QUOTE_DELTA_AMOUNT.comment: The net change in the best bid and best ask prices in the order book, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract. A positive value is an increase in spread and a negative value is a decrease in spread. Quote is currency used to express the value of the base currency. It's often the more well-known or stable currency in the pair. In this case, USDC.

EZ_SPOT_TRADES_ID.name: EZ_SPOT_TRADES_ID
EZ_SPOT_TRADES_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

metadata.name: MSG_ATTRIBUTES
metadata.comment: Records of all message attributes associated to messages that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

MSG_TYPE.name: MSG_TYPE
MSG_TYPE.comment: A string containing information about the type of message occurring.

ATTRIBUTE_KEY.name: ATTRIBUTE_KEY
ATTRIBUTE_KEY.comment: They key from the key-value pair from the message attribute

ATTRIBUTE_VALUE.name: ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
ATTRIBUTE_VALUE.comment: They value from the key-value pair from the message attribute

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The time the block was inserted into to the Flipside database.

metadata.name: TRANSACTIONS
metadata.comment: Records of all transactions that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TX_CODE.name: TX_CODE
TX_CODE.comment: A number that corresponds to various error codes. When "0", the transaction is successful. Non-zero numbers signify different types of transaction failures.

GAS_USED.name: GAS_USED
GAS_USED.comment: The amount of gas consumed by the transaction.

GAS_WANTED.name: GAS_WANTED
GAS_WANTED.comment: Amount of gas requested for a transaction. It is provided by users when the transaction is generated.

MSGS.name: MSGS
MSGS.comment: the undecoded messages in the transaction

metadata.name: GOVERNANCE_VOTES
metadata.comment: Records of all votes on proposals.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

PROPOSAL_ID.name: PROPOSAL_ID
PROPOSAL_ID.comment: Numeric ID that corresponds to the proposal.

VOTER.name: VOTER
VOTER.comment: Address of the delegator that voted on the proposal.

VOTE_OPTION.name: VOTE_OPTION
VOTE_OPTION.comment: How the delegator voted on the proposal.

VOTE_WEIGHT.name: VOTE_WEIGHT
VOTE_WEIGHT.comment: The percentage of one's delegation put towards a voting option. 1 = 100%, etc.

MEMO.name: MEMO
MEMO.comment: The memo the user input into the transaction body

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The time the block was inserted into to the Flipside database.

row_count.description: An approximate count of rows in this table

metadata.name: LP_ACTIONS_ASTROPORT
metadata.comment: Records of liquidity provider that occurred on the Astroport platform

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

LIQUIDITY_PROVIDER_ADDRESS.name: LIQUIDITY_PROVIDER_ADDRESS
LIQUIDITY_PROVIDER_ADDRESS.comment: The address that took an action on the pool.

LP_ACTION.name: LP_ACTION
LP_ACTION.comment: The action that the liquidity provider took. The value is one of the following: add_liquidity,remove_liquidity

TOKEN1_AMOUNT.name: TOKEN1_AMOUNT
TOKEN1_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of the first token provided by the liquidity provider

TOKEN1_CURRENCY.name: TOKEN1_CURRENCY
TOKEN1_CURRENCY.comment: The currency of the first token provided by the liquidity provider

TOKEN2_AMOUNT.name: TOKEN2_AMOUNT
TOKEN2_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of the second token provided by the liquidity provider

TOKEN2_CURRENCY.name: TOKEN2_CURRENCY
TOKEN2_CURRENCY.comment: The currency of the second token provided by the liquidity provider

LP_TOKEN_AMOUNT.name: LP_TOKEN_AMOUNT
LP_TOKEN_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of LP tokens that were added, removed, bonded, or unbonded from the pool.

LP_TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: LP_TOKEN_ADDRESS
LP_TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The address of LP tokens that were added, removed, bonded, or unbonded from the pool.

metadata.name: FACT_TRANSFERS
metadata.comment: Records of all transfers on Sei, including IBC transfers as on- and off-ramps to Sei and wallet to wallet transfers.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TRANSFER_TYPE.name: TRANSFER_TYPE
TRANSFER_TYPE.comment: Details on the type of transfer occurring during the transaction. "IBC_Transfer_In" = depositing tokens onto Sei. "IBC_transfer_out" = withdrawing tokens from Sei. "Sei" = wallet to wallet transfer on Sei.

SENDER.name: SENDER
SENDER.comment: The wallet address of the individual sent tokens in the transfer.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

CURRENCY.name: CURRENCY
CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

RECEIVER.name: RECEIVER
RECEIVER.comment: The wallet address of the individual received tokens in the transfer.

FACT_TRANSFERS_ID.name: FACT_TRANSFERS_ID
FACT_TRANSFERS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP

metadata.name: EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY
metadata.comment: A convenience table that aggregates block and transaction related metrics using various aggregate functions such as SUM, COUNT, MIN and MAX from the fact_transactions table, on an hourly basis. Stats for the current hour will be updated as new data arrives.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP_HOUR.comment: The hour of the timestamp of the block.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN
BLOCK_NUMBER_MIN.comment: The minimum block id in the hour.

BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX
BLOCK_NUMBER_MAX.comment: The maximum block id in the hour.

BLOCK_COUNT.name: BLOCK_COUNT
BLOCK_COUNT.comment: The number of blocks in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT
TRANSACTION_COUNT.comment: The number of transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS
TRANSACTION_COUNT_SUCCESS.comment: The number of successful transactions in the hour.

TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED.name: TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED
TRANSACTION_COUNT_FAILED.comment: The number of failed transactions in the hour.

UNIQUE_FROM_COUNT.name: UNIQUE_FROM_COUNT
UNIQUE_FROM_COUNT.comment: The number of unique tx_from addresses in the hour.

TOTAL_FEES_NATIVE.name: TOTAL_FEES_NATIVE
TOTAL_FEES_NATIVE.comment: The sum of all fees in the hour, in the native fee currency.

TOTAL_FEES_USD.name: TOTAL_FEES_USD
TOTAL_FEES_USD.comment: The sum of all fees in the hour, in USD.

EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID.name: EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID
EZ_CORE_METRICS_HOURLY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS
metadata.comment: Records of all transactions that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_FROM.name: TX_FROM
TX_FROM.comment: The wallet address of the individual who initiated the transaction

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

FEE.name: FEE
FEE.comment: The fee is paid by the initiator of the transaction. Fee = gas * gas price and is given in micro-SEI.

GAS_USED.name: GAS_USED
GAS_USED.comment: The amount of gas consumed by the transaction.

GAS_WANTED.name: GAS_WANTED
GAS_WANTED.comment: Amount of gas requested for a transaction. It is provided by users when the transaction is generated.

TX_CODE.name: TX_CODE
TX_CODE.comment: A number that corresponds to various error codes. When "0", the transaction is successful. Non-zero numbers signify different types of transaction failures.

MSGS.name: MSGS
MSGS.comment: The underlying json from the messages or events within the transactions

FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.name: FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID
FACT_TRANSACTIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.comment: Records of all 'send_packet','acknowledge_packet','timeout_packet' messages on Sei

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Details on the type of transfer occurring during the transaction. "IBC_Transfer_In" = depositing tokens onto Sei. "IBC_transfer_out" = withdrawing tokens from Sei. "Sei" = wallet to wallet transfer on Sei.

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: The wallet address of the individual sent tokens in the transfer.

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

MSG_TYPE.name: MSG_TYPE
MSG_TYPE.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

PACKET_SEQUENCE.name: PACKET_SEQUENCE
PACKET_SEQUENCE.comment: The wallet address of the individual received tokens in the transfer.

PACKET_SRC_CHANNEL.name: PACKET_SRC_CHANNEL
PACKET_SRC_CHANNEL.comment: The wallet address of the individual received tokens in the transfer.

PACKET_DST_CHANNEL.name: PACKET_DST_CHANNEL
PACKET_DST_CHANNEL.comment: The wallet address of the individual received tokens in the transfer.

metadata.name: EZ_MARKET_DEPTH_STATS
metadata.comment: Liquidity data taken from Vertex's Orderbook API, showing amount of liquidity at each price level.

HOUR.name: HOUR
HOUR.comment: The hour in which the stats table data was pull and inserted into the table.

TICKER_ID.name: TICKER_ID
TICKER_ID.comment: Identifier of a ticker with delimiter to separate base/target.

PRODUCT_ID.name: PRODUCT_ID
PRODUCT_ID.comment: The unique id of each product. Evens are perp products and odds are spot products.

ORDERBOOK_SIDE.name: ORDERBOOK_SIDE
ORDERBOOK_SIDE.comment: Designates the bid or ask side of the orderbook price.

VOLUME.name: VOLUME
VOLUME.comment: The quantity for each bid/ask order at the given price level.

PRICE.name: PRICE
PRICE.comment: The price level for each bid/ask order.

ROUND_PRICE_0_01.name: ROUND_PRICE_0_01
ROUND_PRICE_0_01.comment: The price level for each bid/ask order, rounded to nearest cent.

ROUND_PRICE_0_1.name: ROUND_PRICE_0_1
ROUND_PRICE_0_1.comment: The price level for each bid/ask order, rounded to nearest ten cents.

ROUND_PRICE_1.name: ROUND_PRICE_1
ROUND_PRICE_1.comment: The price level for each bid/ask order, rounded to nearest dollar.

ROUND_PRICE_10.name: ROUND_PRICE_10
ROUND_PRICE_10.comment: The price level for each bid/ask order, rounded to nearest 10 dollars.

ROUND_PRICE_100.name: ROUND_PRICE_100
ROUND_PRICE_100.comment: The price level for each bid/ask order, rounded to nearest 100 dollars.

EZ_MARKET_DEPTH_STATS_ID.name: EZ_MARKET_DEPTH_STATS_ID
EZ_MARKET_DEPTH_STATS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH

PRODUCT_ID.name: PRODUCT_ID
PRODUCT_ID.comment: The unique id of each product. Evens are perp products and odds are spot products.

PRODUCT_TYPE.name: PRODUCT_TYPE
PRODUCT_TYPE.comment: The type of product, either spot or perpetual futures.

TICKER_ID.name: TICKER_ID
TICKER_ID.comment: Identifier of a ticker with delimiter to separate base/target.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The specific Vertex product symbol, if it is a futures product it will have a -PERP suffix.

metadata.name: EZ_PRICES_HOURLY
metadata.comment: A convenience table for determining token prices by address and blockchain, and native asset prices by symbol and blockchain. This data set is highly curated and contains metadata for one price per hour per unique asset and blockchain.

HOUR.name: HOUR
HOUR.comment: Hour that the price was recorded at.

TOKEN_ADDRESS.name: TOKEN_ADDRESS
TOKEN_ADDRESS.comment: The specific address representing the asset on a specific platform. This will be NULL if referring to a native asset. The case (upper / lower) may or may not be specified within the `dim_asset_metadata` table, as this column is raw and not transformed, coming directly from the provider APIs. However, in the `ez_` views, it will be lowercase by default for all EVMs.

DECIMALS.name: DECIMALS
DECIMALS.comment: The number of decimals for the asset. May be NULL.

PRICE.name: PRICE
PRICE.comment: Closing price of the recorded hour in USD.

BLOCKCHAIN.name: BLOCKCHAIN
BLOCKCHAIN.comment: The Blockchain, Network, or Platform for this asset.

IS_NATIVE.name: IS_NATIVE
IS_NATIVE.comment: A flag indicating assets native to the respective blockchain.

IS_IMPUTED.name: IS_IMPUTED
IS_IMPUTED.comment: A flag indicating if the price was imputed, or derived, from the last arriving record. This is generally used for tokens with low-liquidity or inconsistent reporting.

IS_DEPRECATED.name: IS_DEPRECATED
IS_DEPRECATED.comment: A flag indicating if the asset is deprecated or no longer supported by the provider.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

EZ_PRICES_HOURLY_ID.name: EZ_PRICES_HOURLY_ID
EZ_PRICES_HOURLY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID

VOTER.name: VOTER
VOTER.comment: Address of the delegator that voted on the proposal.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

CURRENCY.name: CURRENCY
CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

metadata.name: FACT_TOKEN_TRANSFERS
metadata.comment: This table is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please update your queries to use `ez_token_transfers` instead by March 10, 2025.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This will not be unique in this table as a transaction could include multiple transfer events.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address of this transaction.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address of this transaction.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: Contract address of the token being transferred.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The sending address of this transfer.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The receiving address of this transfer. This can be a contract address.

RAW_AMOUNT.name: RAW_AMOUNT
RAW_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of tokens transferred. This value is not decimal adjusted.

RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.name: RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE
RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.comment: The amount of tokens transferred returned as a string to preserve precision. This value is not decimal adjusted.

_LOG_ID.name: _LOG_ID
_LOG_ID.comment: Deprecated. This column is no longer used. Please remove from your query by Jan. 31 2024.

FACT_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.name: FACT_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID
FACT_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_DEX_SWAPS
metadata.comment: Records swap transactions on Sei (both native sei and evm protocols) for Astroport, Fuzio, Seaswap, and Dragonswap

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: This will be either the native sei tx_id or the evm tx_hash. Swaps that are initiated on and native sei protocol will have a tx_id that can be find in CORE.FAC_TRANSACTIONS. Swaps that are initiated on an evm protocol will have a tx_id that is the tx_hash of the evm transaction that can be found in CORE_EVM.FACT_TRANSACTIONS.

ORIGINATED_FROM.name: ORIGINATED_FROM
ORIGINATED_FROM.comment: The evm from address of this transaction.

PLATFORM.name: PLATFORM
PLATFORM.comment: The platform that the swap was initiated on. This will be either astroport, fuzio, seaswap, or dragonswap.

SWAPPER.name: SWAPPER
SWAPPER.comment: The wallet address of the individual who initiated the swap.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address of this transaction.

POOL_ADDRESS.name: POOL_ADDRESS
POOL_ADDRESS.comment: The contract address for the liquidity pool.

AMOUNT_IN_UNADJ.name: AMOUNT_IN_UNADJ
AMOUNT_IN_UNADJ.comment: The non-decimal adjusted amount of tokens put into the swap.

AMOUNT_IN.name: AMOUNT_IN
AMOUNT_IN.comment: The amount of tokens put into the swap. This will be null if we do not have the decimal adjustment for the token.

AMOUNT_IN_USD.name: AMOUNT_IN_USD
AMOUNT_IN_USD.comment: The amount of tokens put into the swap converted to USD using the price of the token. This will be null if we do not have the decimal adjustment or price for the token.

AMOUNT_OUT_UNADJ.name: AMOUNT_OUT_UNADJ
AMOUNT_OUT_UNADJ.comment: The non-decimal adjusted amount of tokens taken out of or received from the swap. This will be null if we do not have the decimal adjustment for the token.

AMOUNT_OUT.name: AMOUNT_OUT
AMOUNT_OUT.comment: The amount of tokens taken out or received from the swap. This will be null if we do not have the decimal adjustment for the token.

AMOUNT_OUT_USD.name: AMOUNT_OUT_USD
AMOUNT_OUT_USD.comment: The amount of tokens taken out or received from the swap converted to USD using the price of the token. This will be null if we do not have the decimal adjustment or price for the token.

TOKEN_IN.name: TOKEN_IN
TOKEN_IN.comment: The address of the token sent for swap.

SYMBOL_IN.name: SYMBOL_IN
SYMBOL_IN.comment: The symbol of the token sent for swap.

TOKEN_OUT.name: TOKEN_OUT
TOKEN_OUT.comment: The address of the token being swapped to.

SYMBOL_OUT.name: SYMBOL_OUT
SYMBOL_OUT.comment: The symbol of the token being swapped to.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of the contract call.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.comment: This is the event_index for evm transactions or the msg_index for native sei transactions. This is used to uniquely identify the action within the transaction.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address at the transaction level. Note: this will only be populated for evm transactions.

SENDER.name: SENDER
SENDER.comment: The Router is the Sender in the swap function. Note: this will only be populated for evm transactions.

TX_TO.name: TX_TO
TX_TO.comment: The tx_to is the address who receives the swapped token. This corresponds to the "to" field in the swap function.  Note: this will only be populated for evm transactions.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The decoded event name for a given event.

EZ_DEX_SWAPS_ID.name: EZ_DEX_SWAPS_ID
EZ_DEX_SWAPS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: FACT_PRICES_OHLC_HOURLY
metadata.comment: A comprehensive fact table holding id and provider specific open, high, low, close hourly prices, from multiple providers. This data set includes raw, non-transformed data coming directly from the provider APIs and rows are not intended to be unique. As a result, there may be data quality issues persisting in the APIs that flow through to this fact based model. If you are interested in using a curated data set instead, please utilize ez_prices_hourly.

ASSET_ID.name: ASSET_ID
ASSET_ID.comment: The unique identifier representing the asset.

HOUR.name: HOUR
HOUR.comment: Hour that the price was recorded at.

OPEN.name: OPEN
OPEN.comment: Opening price of the recorded hour in USD.

HIGH.name: HIGH

LOW.name: LOW
LOW.comment: Lowest price of the recorded hour in USD

CLOSE.name: CLOSE

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP

FACT_PRICES_OHLC_HOURLY_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

SWAPPER.name: SWAPPER

TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

FEE.name: FEE

GAS_USED.name: GAS_USED

GAS_WANTED.name: GAS_WANTED
GAS_WANTED.comment: Amount of gas requested for a transaction. It is provided by users when the transaction is generated.

TX_CODE.name: TX_CODE
TX_CODE.comment: A number that corresponds to various error codes. When "0", the transaction is successful. Non-zero numbers signify different types of transaction failures.

MSGS.name: MSGS

metadata.name: FACT_TRACES
metadata.comment: This table contains flattened trace data for internal contract calls on the SEI EVM Blockchain. Hex encoded fields can be decoded to integers by using `utils.udf_hex_to_int()`.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number of this transaction.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The block timestamp of this transaction.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: The transaction hash for the trace. Please note, this is not necessarily unique in this table as transactions frequently have multiple traces.

TX_POSITION.name: TX_POSITION
TX_POSITION.comment: The position of the transaction within the block.

TRACE_INDEX.name: TRACE_INDEX
TRACE_INDEX.comment: The index of the trace within the transaction.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The sending address of this trace. This is not necessarily the from address of the transaction.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The receiving address of this trace. This is not necessarily the to address of the transaction.

INPUT.name: INPUT
INPUT.comment: The input data for this trace.

OUTPUT.name: OUTPUT
OUTPUT.comment: The output data for this trace.

TYPE.name: TYPE
TYPE.comment: The type of internal transaction. Common trace types are `CALL`, `DELEGATECALL`, and `STATICCALL`.

TRACE_ADDRESS.name: TRACE_ADDRESS
TRACE_ADDRESS.comment: This field represents the position of the trace within the transaction.

SUB_TRACES.name: SUB_TRACES
SUB_TRACES.comment: The amount of nested sub traces for this trace.

VALUE.name: VALUE
VALUE.comment: The amount of ETH transferred in this trace.

VALUE_PRECISE_RAW.name: VALUE_PRECISE_RAW
VALUE_PRECISE_RAW.comment: The precise, unadjusted amount of the transaction. This is returned as a string to avoid precision loss.

VALUE_PRECISE.name: VALUE_PRECISE
VALUE_PRECISE.comment: The precise, adjusted amount of the transaction. This is returned as a string to avoid precision loss.

GAS.name: GAS
GAS.comment: The gas supplied for this trace.

GAS_USED.name: GAS_USED
GAS_USED.comment: The gas used for this trace.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature at the transaction level.

TRACE_SUCCEEDED.name: TRACE_SUCCEEDED
TRACE_SUCCEEDED.comment: Whether the trace succeeded or failed

ERROR_REASON.name: ERROR_REASON
ERROR_REASON.comment: The reason for the trace failure, if any.

REVERT_REASON.name: REVERT_REASON
REVERT_REASON.comment: The reason for the trace revert, if any.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Whether the transaction succeeded or failed

IDENTIFIER.name: IDENTIFIER
IDENTIFIER.comment: This field represents the position and type of the trace within the transaction.

DATA.name: DATA
DATA.comment: The raw JSON data for this trace.

TRACE_STATUS.name: TRACE_STATUS
TRACE_STATUS.comment: The status of the trace, either `SUCCESS` or `FAIL`

FACT_TRACES_ID.name: FACT_TRACES_ID
FACT_TRACES_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: NFT_SALES_COMBINED
metadata.comment: Records of nft sales on sei

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

CURRENCY.name: CURRENCY
CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

row_count.label: Row Count
row_count.description: An approximate count of rows in this table

clustering_key.label: Clustering Key
clustering_key.description: The key used to cluster this table

bytes.label: Approximate Size
bytes.description: Approximate size of the table as reported by Snowflake

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

row_count.description: An approximate count of rows in this table

metadata.name: EZ_LIQUIDATIONS
metadata.comment: All Vertex liquidations. Once an account’s maintenance margin reaches [$]0, the account is eligible for liquidation. Liquidation events happen one by one, with the riskiest positions being liquidated first. Liquidations are based on the oracle price.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This field will not be unique in this table, as a given transaction can include multiple events.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The decoded event name for a given event.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address of this transaction.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address of this transaction.

DIGEST.name: DIGEST
DIGEST.comment: The identifier for a specific trade, this can be split across two or more base deltas in order to fill the entire amount of the trade.

TRADER.name: TRADER
TRADER.comment: The wallet address of the trader, there can be multiple subaccounts associated with a trader.

SUBACCOUNT.name: SUBACCOUNT
SUBACCOUNT.comment: Independent Vertex account of trader with its own margin, balance, positions, and trades. Any wallet can open an arbitrary number of these. Risk is not carried over from subaccount to subaccount.

PRODUCT_ID.name: PRODUCT_ID
PRODUCT_ID.comment:
The product to liquidate as well as the liquidation mode:
Perp Liquidation: Any valid perp product_id with is_encode_spread set to false. 
Spot Liquidation: Any valid spot product_id with is_encode_spread set to false. 
Spread Liquidation: If there are perp and spot positions in different directions, liquidate both at the same time. is_encode_spread must be set to true.

If it is a spread liquidation this column will show the perp product_id, for both ids refer to the spread_product_ids array.

Only available in V2 Vertex liquidations, which went live March 8th 2024.

HEALTH_GROUP.name: HEALTH_GROUP
HEALTH_GROUP.comment: The spot / perp product pair of health group i where health_groups[i][0] is the spot product_id and health_groups[i][1] is the perp product_id. Additionally, it is possible for a health group to only have either a spot or perp product, in which case, the product that doesn’t exist is set to 0.

HEALTH_GROUP_SYMBOL.name: HEALTH_GROUP_SYMBOL
HEALTH_GROUP_SYMBOL.comment: The token symbol represented by the specific health group. For example WBTC and BTC-PERP is BTC.

AMOUNT_UNADJ.name: AMOUNT_UNADJ
AMOUNT_UNADJ.comment: The total size of the trade in units of the asset being traded.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The total size of the trade in units of the asset being traded across one digest, decimal adjusted. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

AMOUNT_QUOTE_UNADJ.name: AMOUNT_QUOTE_UNADJ
AMOUNT_QUOTE_UNADJ.comment: To liquidate a position, there must be a payment (transfer) between the liquidator and the position holder. This done in the quote currency, USDC. Payments are signed as positive, meaning you received the USDC, or negative, meaning you paid. For perpetual liquidations, users should expect to see a (+) USDC payment. They will see a (-) USDC payment for borrowers since they need to pay the user for buying their borrow.

AMOUNT_QUOTE.name: AMOUNT_QUOTE
AMOUNT_QUOTE.comment: To liquidate a position, there must be a payment (transfer) between the liquidator and the position holder. This done in the quote currency, USDC. Payments are signed as positive, meaning you received the USDC, or negative, meaning you paid. For perpetual liquidations, users should expect to see a (+) USDC payment. They will see a (-) USDC payment for borrowers since they need to pay the user for buying their borrow. All amounts and prices are adjusted 18 decimals points regardless of underlying asset contract.

SPREAD_PRODUCT_IDS.name: SPREAD_PRODUCT_IDS
SPREAD_PRODUCT_IDS.comment: Array of product_ids that have been decoded from binary. Only available when is_encode_spread is true and the liquidation occurs on V2 Vertex, which went live March 8th 2024.

EZ_LIQUIDATIONS_ID.name: EZ_LIQUIDATIONS_ID
EZ_LIQUIDATIONS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS
metadata.comment: This table contains events on the Avalanche Blockchain with an event name of 'Transfer'. The contract address is the token transferred, and the raw amount field is the amount of tokens transferred. Please note this amount is not decimal adjusted. Decimal adjustments for a token address can be found in ```dim_contracts```. This table will not contain transfers of native ETH.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed. This will not be unique in this table as a transaction could include multiple transfer events.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of this transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address of this transaction.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address of this transaction.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: Contract address of the token being transferred.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The sending address of this transfer.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The receiving address of this transfer. This can be a contract address.

RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.name: RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE
RAW_AMOUNT_PRECISE.comment: The amount of tokens transferred returned as a string to preserve precision. This value is not decimal adjusted.

RAW_AMOUNT.name: RAW_AMOUNT
RAW_AMOUNT.comment: The amount of tokens transferred. This value is not decimal adjusted.

AMOUNT_PRECISE.name: AMOUNT_PRECISE
AMOUNT_PRECISE.comment: The decimal transformed amount for this token returned as a string to preserve precision. Tokens without a decimal adjustment will be nulled out here.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The decimal transformed amount for this token. Tokens without a decimal adjustment will be nulled out here.

DECIMALS.name: DECIMALS
DECIMALS.comment: The number of decimal places this contract needs adjusted where token values exist. For example, use the decimal field to correctly transform raw amounts in ```fact_token_transfers```.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The symbol belonging to the address of the token

EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.name: EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID
EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

HAS_DECIMAL.name: HAS_DECIMAL
HAS_DECIMAL.comment: This column is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please update your queries by March 10, 2025. Please use `DECIMALS` instead.

_LOG_ID.name: _LOG_ID
_LOG_ID.comment: This column is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please update your queries by March 10, 2025. Please use `EZ_TOKEN_TRANSFERS_ID` instead.

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: This column is being deprecated for standardization purposes. Please update your queries by March 10, 2025. Please use `INSERTED_TIMESTAMP` instead.

metadata.name: FACT_MSG_ATTRIBUTES
metadata.comment: Records of all message attributes associated to messages that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

MSG_TYPE.name: MSG_TYPE
MSG_TYPE.comment: A string containing information about the type of message occurring.

ATTRIBUTE_KEY.name: ATTRIBUTE_KEY
ATTRIBUTE_KEY.comment: They key from the key-value pair from the message attribute

ATTRIBUTE_VALUE.name: ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
ATTRIBUTE_VALUE.comment: They value from the key-value pair from the message attribute

FACT_MSG_ATTRIBUTES_ID.name: FACT_MSG_ATTRIBUTES_ID
FACT_MSG_ATTRIBUTES_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.

metadata.name: TRANSFERS
metadata.comment: Records of all transfers on Sei, including IBC transfers as on- and off-ramps to Sei and wallet to wallet transfers

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TRANSFER_TYPE.name: TRANSFER_TYPE
TRANSFER_TYPE.comment: Details on the type of transfer occurring during the transaction. "IBC_Transfer_In" = depositing tokens onto Sei. "IBC_transfer_out" = withdrawing tokens from Sei. "Sei" = wallet to wallet transfer on Sei.

SENDER.name: SENDER
SENDER.comment: The wallet address of the individual sent tokens in the transfer.

RECEIVER.name: RECEIVER
RECEIVER.comment: The wallet address of the individual received tokens in the transfer.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

CURRENCY.name: CURRENCY
CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The time the block was inserted into to the Flipside database.

metadata.name: EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS
metadata.comment:
For information on how to submit a contract for decoding, as well as how ABIs are sourced, please visit [here](https://science.flipsidecrypto.xyz/abi-requestor/).
      This model contains decoded event logs for contracts that we have an ABI for. Please note, this table does not include all event logs, only those that we have an ABI for.
      The `decoded_log` column is the easiest place to query decoded data. It is a JSON object, where the keys are the names of the event parameters, and the values are the values of the event parameters.
      You can select from this column using the following sample format, `decoded_log:from::string` or more generally, `decoded_log:<event_param>::datatype`. See below for a full sample query.
      The `full_decoded_logs` column contains the same information, as well as additional fields such as the datatype of the decoded data. You may need to laterally flatten this column to query the data.
            
      Sample query for USDC Transfer events:
      
      ```sql
      select 
      tx_hash,
      block_number,
      contract_address,
      decoded_log:from::string as from_address,
      decoded_log:to::string as to_address,
      decoded_log:value::integer as value
      from ethereum.core.fact_decoded_event_logs
      where contract_address = lower('0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48')
      and block_number between 16400000 and 16405000
      and event_name = 'Transfer'
      limit 50```

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: Also known as block height. The block number, which indicates the length of the blockchain, increases after the addition of each new block.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block was produced.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: Transaction hash is a unique 66-character identifier that is generated when a transaction is executed.

TX_POSITION.name: TX_POSITION
TX_POSITION.comment: The position of the transaction within the block.

CONTRACT_ADDRESS.name: CONTRACT_ADDRESS
CONTRACT_ADDRESS.comment: The address interacted with for a given event.

TOPIC_0.name: TOPIC_0
TOPIC_0.comment: The first topic of the event, which is a unique identifier for the event.

TOPIC_1.name: TOPIC_1
TOPIC_1.comment: The second topic of the event, if applicable.

TOPIC_2.name: TOPIC_2
TOPIC_2.comment: The third topic of the event, if applicable.

TOPIC_3.name: TOPIC_3
TOPIC_3.comment: The fourth topic of the event, if applicable.

EVENT_REMOVED.name: EVENT_REMOVED
EVENT_REMOVED.comment: Whether the event has been removed from the transaction.

ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The from address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.name: ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS
ORIGIN_TO_ADDRESS.comment: The to address at the transaction level.

ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.name: ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE
ORIGIN_FUNCTION_SIGNATURE.comment: The function signature of the contract call that triggered this transaction.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Whether the transaction was successful, returned as a boolean.

EVENT_NAME.name: EVENT_NAME
EVENT_NAME.comment: The name of the event, as defined in the contract ABI.

FULL_DECODED_DATA.name: FULL_DECODED_DATA
FULL_DECODED_DATA.comment: This column will be deprecated on 3/10/2025. Please use `FULL_DECODED_LOG` instead.

DECODED_LOG.name: DECODED_LOG
DECODED_LOG.comment: The flattened decoded log, where the keys are the names of the event parameters, and the values are the values of the event parameters.

CONTRACT_NAME.name: CONTRACT_NAME
CONTRACT_NAME.comment: The name of the contract, if the contract has a name() function.

EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS_ID.name: EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS_ID
EZ_DECODED_EVENT_LOGS_ID.comment: The unique identifier for each row in the table.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The UTC timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The UTC timestamp at which the row was last modified.

FULL_DECODED_LOG.name: FULL_DECODED_LOG
FULL_DECODED_LOG.comment: The full decoded log, including the event name, the event parameters, and the data type of the event parameters.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_SUCCEEDED.name: TX_SUCCEEDED
TX_SUCCEEDED.comment: Transaction status is TRUE if the transaction was successful, FALSE if the transaction failed.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_INDEX.name: MSG_INDEX
MSG_INDEX.comment: Short for "message index," the position in which messages occur in a transaction.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

CURRENCY.name: CURRENCY
CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

metadata.name: STAKING
metadata.comment: Records of all staking related transactions that have occurred on Sei, dating back to the genesis block. These actions include delegate, undelegate, and redelegate.

BLOCK_ID.name: BLOCK_ID
BLOCK_ID.comment: The block height the block was recorded at.

BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.name: BLOCK_TIMESTAMP
BLOCK_TIMESTAMP.comment: The date and time at which the block began.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A unique key that identifies a transaction. Called "TxHash" on block explorers.

TX_CALLER_ADDRESS.name: TX_CALLER_ADDRESS
TX_CALLER_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the individual who initiated the transaction.

ACTION.name: ACTION
ACTION.comment: The action taken in the msg group. For staking this includes delegate, undelegate, redelegate, withdraw_rewards.

MSG_GROUP.name: MSG_GROUP
MSG_GROUP.comment: Value grouping different messages together to represent a single action. Format will include the numeric msg_group and msg_sub_group with a ":" seperator. The subgroup will always be 0 except for "Exec" actions. NULL group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

MSG_SUB_GROUP.name: MSG_SUB_GROUP
MSG_SUB_GROUP.comment: Silver only -- Numeric value grouping different messages together to represent a single action within a group. This is relevent for exec actions that contain mutiple underlying actions. NULL sub group means messages are related to the header (overall transaction)

DELEGATOR_ADDRESS.name: DELEGATOR_ADDRESS
DELEGATOR_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the individual who owns the delegated asset.

AMOUNT.name: AMOUNT
AMOUNT.comment: The amount that was used in the transaction message.

CURRENCY.name: CURRENCY
CURRENCY.comment: The currency that was used in the transaction message.

VALIDATOR_ADDRESS.name: VALIDATOR_ADDRESS
VALIDATOR_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the validator related to the staking action.

REDELEGATE_SOURCE_VALIDATOR_ADDRESS.name: REDELEGATE_SOURCE_VALIDATOR_ADDRESS
REDELEGATE_SOURCE_VALIDATOR_ADDRESS.comment: The wallet address of the source alidator in a redelegation staking action.

COMPLETION_TIME.name: COMPLETION_TIME
COMPLETION_TIME.comment: The time at which the undelegate or redelegate staking action is completed.

_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: _INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
_INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The time the block was inserted into to the Flipside database.

metadata.name: EZ_MONEY_MARKETS
metadata.comment: Vertex integrates a decentralized money market directly into its DEX, enabling borrowing and lending of crypto assets using overcollateralized lending rules. Interest rates are dynamically adjusted based on supply and demand, incentivizing liquidity provision and balancing borrowing costs. The money market operates on-chain (e.g., on Arbitrum) and is managed through Vertex’s risk engine and clearinghouse, offering users automated borrowing via portfolio margin and passive yield opportunities on idle assets. This table tracks the money market products available on Vertex on an hourly basis.

HOUR.name: HOUR
HOUR.comment: The hour in which the stats table data was pull and inserted into the table.

TICKER_ID.name: TICKER_ID
TICKER_ID.comment: Identifier of a ticker with delimiter to separate base/target.

SYMBOL.name: SYMBOL
SYMBOL.comment: The specific Vertex product symbol, if it is a futures product it will have a -PERP suffix.

PRODUCT_ID.name: PRODUCT_ID
PRODUCT_ID.comment: The unique id of each product. Evens are perp products and odds are spot products.

DEPOSIT_APR.name: DEPOSIT_APR
DEPOSIT_APR.comment: The recorded deposit APR for the money market product in that hour.

BORROW_APR.name: BORROW_APR
BORROW_APR.comment: The recorded borrow APR for the money market product in that hour.

TVL.name: TVL
TVL.comment: The sum total value locked for the money market product in that hour.

INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.name: INSERTED_TIMESTAMP
INSERTED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was inserted into the table.

MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.name: MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP
MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP.comment: The utc timestamp at which the row was last modified.
